title: Report Pluggin
description: A player report plugin for 1.21.4 that allows your players to report other players, i.e. for hacks or breaking the rules.
body:
This is a user reporting plugin that adds /report, /viewreports, /closereport into the game! It makes it so your players can report the other players for any reason, ie cheats or breaking of the rules. 


/report:
Report another player
/<command> <player> <reason>


/viewreports:
View open reports
/<command>

/closereports:
Close a report
/<command> <reportID>

Permission: playerreportplugin.managereports
Required to view/close reports
